testcase.name: test_create_quote
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_api.py:117: in test_create_quote assert response.status_code == 200, f"Quote creation failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Quote creation failed: {"detail":{"code":"LISTING_NOT_AVAILABLE","message":"This property is not available for the selected dates."}} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_quote
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_api.py:140: in test_get_quote assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_quote_pricing
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_api.py:159: in test_quote_pricing assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_checkout_session
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_api.py:185: in test_create_checkout_session assert quote_response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
